emails.subject: Dynegy Direct
emails.body: Tana, I have picked up the Dynegy Direct contract from Sally Beck. Jean Mrha has signed it, and I will be faxing a copy and mailing one of the originals of the agreement back to Dynegy tomorrow. Please let me know if you need anything else on this agreement. Thanks, Judy Thorne

emails.subject: Dynegy Direct
emails.body: Tana, I have picked up the Dynegy Direct contract from Sally Beck. Jean Mrha has signed it, and I will be faxing a copy and mailing one of the originals of the agreement back to Dynegy tomorrow. Please let me know if you need anything else on this agreement. Thanks, Judy Thorne

emails.subject: Re: Dynegy Direct
emails.body: Re: Dynegy Direct Please return our original copy of the agreement to me along with the copy of the cover letter evidencing that you sent the copy to Dynegy. Thanks. Judy Thorne/ENRON@enronXgate 06/05/2001 06:11 PM

emails.subject: Re: Dynegy Direct
emails.body: Re: Dynegy Direct Please return our original copy of the agreement to me along with the copy of the cover letter evidencing that you sent the copy to Dynegy. Thanks. Judy Thorne/ENRON@enronXgate 06/05/2001 06:11 PM

emails.subject: RE: Dynegy Direct
emails.body: RE: Dynegy Direct Tana, I just noticed that the contract is not signed by Dynegy. I have to send back both originals. Do you want me to FedEx it to them or do you want to do it? Judy

emails.subject: RE: Dynegy Direct
emails.body: RE: Dynegy Direct Tana, I just noticed that the contract is not signed by Dynegy. I have to send back both originals. Do you want me to FedEx it to them or do you want to do it? Judy

emails.subject: RE: Dynegy Direct
emails.body: No, please send to me and I will handle. Judy Thorne/ENRON@enronXgate 06/06/2001 09:06 AM

emails.subject: RE: Dynegy Direct
emails.body: No, please send to me and I will handle. Judy Thorne/ENRON@enronXgate 06/06/2001 09:06 AM
